items.title: RT by @sundarpichai: RT by @sundarpichai: Google Cloud is now at ~$100B revenue run-rate, growing 80%+ and is 40% of Google's search business. Wild that Google Cloud could be nearly as big as Google Search in revenue in the next year or two on its current trajectory.
items.content:
Google Cloud is now at ~$100B revenue run-rate, growing 80%+ and is 40% of Google's search business. Wild that Google Cloud could be nearly as big as Google Search in revenue in the next year or two on its current trajectory.
— @chetanp Jul 22, 2026

items.title: Q2 was an amazing quarter, with our AI investments redefining what’s possible across every part of our business. Alphabet revenue grew 24% YoY and Google Cloud accelerated to 82% growth. We saw exciting momentum across the board from Search to YouTube to the Gemini app (which reached 950M monthly active users). Our model APIs are processing 22B tokens/min (up from 16B+ last quarter) driven by our workhorse Flash models. We’re also seeing great adoption of Gemini Enterprise, used by 90% of the Fortune 100, as well as strong demand for our security solutions. Outstanding results and momentum, and such an exciting moment—thanks to all of our partners and employees around the world! 🙌 About to
items.content:
Q2 was an amazing quarter, with our AI investments redefining what’s possible across every part of our business.

Alphabet revenue grew 24% YoY and Google Cloud accelerated to 82% growth. We saw exciting momentum across the board from Search to YouTube to the Gemini app (which reached 950M monthly active users). Our model APIs are processing 22B tokens/min (up from 16B+ last quarter) driven by our workhorse Flash models. We’re also seeing great adoption of Gemini Enterprise, used by 90% of the Fortune 100, as well as strong demand for our security solutions.

Outstanding results and momentum, and such an exciting moment—thanks to all of our partners and employees around the world! 🙌 About to hop on the call!
— Sundar Pichai (@sundarpichai) Jul 22, 2026

items.title: Excited to see our first @Android Gemini Intelligence features rolling out to @SamsungMobile foldable devices. That includes task automation now expanding to 40+ popular apps to help handle everything from shopping and making dinner reservations to booking travel and buying concert tickets.
items.content:
Excited to see our first  @Android Gemini Intelligence features rolling out to  @SamsungMobile foldable devices. That includes task automation now expanding to 40+ popular apps to help handle everything from shopping and making dinner reservations to booking travel and buying concert tickets.Sameer Samat (@ssamat)Congrats to the  @SamsungMobile team on another great  #GalaxyUnpacked ! Today, we introduced the first capabilities of Gemini Intelligence coming to Samsung’s new foldable devices, along with other updates:

✨ Task automation: Delegate daily "life admin" (reservations, shopping, travel) across 40+ popular apps. 

📚 Gemini Notebook: Pre-installed on every new foldable device, you can drag-and-drop sources side-by-side to generate slide decks, podcasts, and custom study guides. Plus, get a 6-month trial of Google AI Pro!

⌚️👓  Gemini on the go: Access Gemini on the Galaxy Watch9 by simply raising your wrist. We also shared two more frame designs of the upcoming intelligent eyewear collections with Gentle Monster and Warby Parker.

📲 Easier switching: Our native migration tool now lets you switch from iPhone wirelessly, now transferring passwords, Wi-Fi credentials, and eSIMs.

Excited to keep building the future of mobile with  @SamsungMobile . And thank you to the  @Android and  @GeminiApp teams for all the hard work! 

Check out the blog post to learn more about today’s updates:  blog.google/products-and-pla… 
Video
  —  https://x.com/ssamat/status/2079933042718617782 
— Sundar Pichai (@sundarpichai) Jul 22, 2026

items.title: RT by @sundarpichai: RT by @sundarpichai: Designing a compelling slide deck from scratch is one of the most time consuming tasks. Today we are making it dramatically easier with the power of Gemini. You can now use Gemini in Google Slides to generate complete, on-brand presentations in a matter of minutes. (It is a genuine time saver for anyone who regularly pitches new concepts.) The generated slides are fully editable, so you maintain total creative control. Not Images. Not PDFs. 🙂 Give it a try at  🧵 1/3
items.content:
Designing a compelling slide deck from scratch is one of the most time consuming tasks. Today we are making it dramatically easier with the power of Gemini.

You can now use Gemini in Google Slides to generate complete, on-brand presentations in a matter of minutes. (It is a genuine time saver for anyone who regularly pitches new concepts.) 

The generated slides are fully editable, so you maintain total creative control. Not Images. Not PDFs. 🙂 

Give it a try at  slides.new 

🧵 1/3

 x.com/GoogleWorkspace/status… 
Video

— @ChanduThota Jul 22, 2026

items.title: The numbers are in: 1.7B+ global viewers tuned in to @YouTube to watch World Cup-related videos during the tournament. ⚽️ It was our most viewed World Cup ever on YouTube, bringing lifetime views of related content to over 200B!
items.content:
The numbers are in: 1.7B+ global viewers tuned in to  @YouTube to watch World Cup-related videos during the tournament. ⚽️ It was our most viewed World Cup ever on YouTube, bringing lifetime views of related content to over 200B!Neal Mohan (@nealmohan)What an unforgettable  @FIFAWorldCup !⚽🔥 
 Here’s how the world followed the tournament on  @YouTube :
📺 1.7B+ unique global viewers and 200B+ lifetime views of World Cup related content
🔥 2.5B+ views from our creator cohort who brought iconic commentary and perspectives throughout the tournament
🏆 10M+ live views for our first Creator Cup

Congrats on an incredible championship, Spain! And a huge thanks to our partners, creators and teams at YouTube who made the fan experience unlike any other.—  https://x.com/nealmohan/status/2079744131556085817 
— Sundar Pichai (@sundarpichai) Jul 22, 2026

items.title: RT by @sundarpichai: RT by @sundarpichai: Today’s launches are all about better performance, lower latency, and a smaller bill. + 3.6 Flash cuts token usage by up to 65% on complex coding + 3.5 Flash-Lite reaches speeds of 350 output tokens/sec Both are live in the Gemini app today! Next up: Gemini 3.5 Pro, which has officially entered partner testing.
items.content:
Today’s launches are all about better performance, lower latency, and a smaller bill.

+ 3.6 Flash cuts token usage by up to 65% on complex coding
+ 3.5 Flash-Lite reaches speeds of 350 output tokens/sec

Both are live in the Gemini app today!

Next up: Gemini 3.5 Pro, which has officially entered partner testing.Google DeepMind (@GoogleDeepMind)We’re rolling out three new models to make AI agents faster, smarter, and cheaper at scale:

🔵 Gemini 3.6 Flash: It uses fewer tokens than 3.5 Flash to deliver higher quality work at the exact same cost.

🔵 Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite: A fast, cost-effective option for everyday tasks like processing documents and agentic search.

🔵 Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber: A cybersecurity model built to find and patch critical software vulnerabilities.  —  https://x.com/GoogleDeepMind/status/2079589698490572961 
— @joshwoodward Jul 21, 2026

items.title: An absolutely incredible performance by Spain to take home the World Cup! 🇪🇸🏆 So well-deserved, just a beautiful display of teamwork all tournament. Congratulations to Argentina & Messi on a great run. And huge kudos to all of the teams and fans around the world for making this World Cup so memorable, already looking forward to 2030!
items.content:
An absolutely incredible performance by Spain to take home the World Cup! 🇪🇸🏆 So well-deserved, just a beautiful display of teamwork all tournament. Congratulations to Argentina & Messi on a great run. And huge kudos to all of the teams and fans around the world for making this World Cup so memorable, already looking forward to 2030! 
Video

— Sundar Pichai (@sundarpichai) Jul 19, 2026
